mapper.sql: select id, business_type, business_id, business_no, node_code, action_type, from_status, to_status, action_by, action_time, action_remark, factory_id, create_time from t_erp_approval_log a
mapper.select: where a.business_type = #{businessType} and a.business_id = #{businessId} order by a.action_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_erp_approval_log (business_type, business_id, business_no, node_code, action_type, from_status, to_status, action_by, action_time, action_remark, factory_id, create_time) values (#{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{businessNo}, #{nodeCode}, #{actionType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actionBy}, #{actionTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{actionRemark}, #{factoryId}, NOW())
